/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libzmr_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so -o libzmr_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so CMakeFiles/zmr_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c/zmr_interfaces/msg/detail/current_future_states__type_support.c.o CMakeFiles/zmr_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c/zmr_interfaces/srv/detail/get_other_robot_states__type_support.c.o CMakeFiles/zmr_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c/zmr_interfaces/srv/detail/get_robot_state__type_support.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/michael/ros2_ws_test/build/zmr_interfaces:/opt/ros/humble/lib: libzmr_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic
